theme: hand-scheduling a hot loop for a toy core
title: Hot-Loop Scheduler for an In-Order Dual-Issue Core
strategies: round-robin list scheduling across independent accumulate chains to maximize dual-issue occupancy, assuming every load hits (greedy / textbook fixed-latency scheduling)
union-find the chains into cache-set equivalence classes via their touched addresses mod S, serialize chains within a class, round-robin only across classes (strong)
true optimal joint hazard+cache schedule (open ceiling, unreached)
